creator: _jkrow
caption:
What do you actually DO on an Antarctica cruise?

This is what a full day on board the National Geographic Explorer looks like on an an expedition to Antarctica with @lindbladexp 🚢 

Full expedition days include:
- morning zodiac rides or landings
- wildlife encounters
- back to the ship for lunch and briefings
- afternoon landings or zodiac rides somewhere else
- evening recaps and cocktail hour while everyone shares photos and stories from the day
- a 3 course meal or buffet dinner prepared by the INCREDIBLY talented chef and staff onboard

Save this and follow for more of Antarctica is on your travel wishlist ✨

transcription.text: Good morning, good morning. Good afternoon, good afternoon. Thank you. Thank you.
